/usr/bin/ar qc libray_tracer.a CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Sphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Disk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Cylinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Cone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Quad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Box.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Triangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_ObjectList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Lambertian.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Metallic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Dielectric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Isotropic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_BVH.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_Medium.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_PointLight.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ray_tracer.dir/RT_DirectionalLight.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libray_tracer.a
